title: nousergon.alert.v1
description: Structured fleet alert event emitted by the krepis alert chokepoints onto the nousergon-alerts EventBridge bus (EventBridge entry Detail payload). Additive-only evolution: new fields must be optional; breaking changes require a v2 DetailType alongside v1.

origin.description: The krepis chokepoint that emitted the event.

source.description: Caller-supplied source identifier, or env attribution (KREPIS_EVENT_SOURCE / AWS_LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME), or null.

severity.description: Normalized severity; unrecognized raw strings map to warning.

severity_raw.description: The caller's free-form severity string before normalization; null when the origin has no severity concept (direct Telegram sends).

body.description: Alert text, truncated to 4000 chars (human channels carry the full text).

dedup_key.description: The alert's dedup key when the caller used one; the Overseer drain groups incidents by it.

channels.description: Per-channel delivery outcomes; null values mean the channel was not attempted.

disable_notification.description: Telegram silent-delivery flag when known (silent=true proxies info-tier for direct sends).
